productDisplayName: Nautica Men Sliver Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Multifunction analog watch with a steel round caseDial style: Silver dial with black and white handsStrap style: Steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: Tachymeter, three chronograph time displays, date apeture on the dial and water resistant to 100 M, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 year
